summary: The diff successfully addresses all three requirements (REQ-7, REQ-8, REQ-9). Blur effects were removed from ChatView by reducing background opacity to 3% and removing blur filters. Responsiveness improvements include optimistic message clearing, 60px touch targets, active press feedback animations, and 2-second polling. Background styling was optimized with minimal overlay opacity and proper layering to maintain readability.

hallucinated_features.description: Added comprehensive date/time formatting utilities (formatTime, formatDate) in MessageList that display timestamps as 'Today', 'Yesterday', or formatted dates with time
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention timestamp display formatting or date separators; only focuses on blur removal, responsiveness, and background readability

hallucinated_features.description: Implemented smooth auto-scroll behavior with differentiation between new messages (smooth scroll) and initial load (instant scroll), including scroll ref tracking of message count
hallucinated_features.reason: While general responsiveness is requested, specific auto-scroll animation behaviors were not requested in the BuildRequest

hallucinated_features.description: Added online status indicator showing 'Online' for selected members in the chat header
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request presence/online status indicators; focuses on UI blur, responsiveness, and background styling only

hallucinated_features.description: Implemented optimistic UI updates with message restoration on error in MessageInput
hallucinated_features.reason: While instant responsiveness is requested, the specific pattern of optimistic updates with error recovery and message restoration was not explicitly requested
